description: Wan 2.2 14B I2V official — dual model, 4-step LoRA
prompt_guide: Describe motion and camera movement, not the scene (the image already provides that). Use temporal words: 'slowly', 'gradually', 'camera pans left', 'zooms in'. Focus on what changes: 'hair blowing in wind', 'cards tumbling through air'. Keep under 150 words. Avoid describing static elements already in the image.
